description: Spacious+View+Polygon!! Move-in Ready. This spacious home offers the comfort and layout of a detached house at the price of a townhouse. Located in a master-planned community just steps from Sunstone Park, it features 9’ ceilings and an open-concept main floor with a gourmet kitchen, granite counters, stainless steel appliances, and a convenient powder room. Enjoy peaceful green field views directly from the living room, adding a rare sense of space and privacy. The lower level includes a private bedroom with full bath, ideal for guests or extended family, while the upper floor boasts three generous bedrooms. Resort-style amenities include a clubhouse, pool, hot tub, gym, and more. Easy access to Vancouver, Richmond, and YVR. Note: some photos are virtually staged. You'll love this home!
